description: Style NoteFor the non-conformist high-fashion male, this pair of shoes from red tape is the right choice. Styled in genuine, soft leather for optimal comfort, this pair does not compromise on its style quotient. Wear this with chinos or corduroy trousers, a black leather belt, a casual shirt with a scarf. This off-duty ensemble is perfect to wear for coffee dates in the evenings. Product DetailsBrown slip-on with a square shaped toe with stitched detailing on the seams of the toe, overlays and reinforced overlay at the heel collarOutsole adhered to the upperDurable rubber outsole with textured grooves and stacked heel Material and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner if neededDo not store in direct sunlight
